name: GDPR Data Subject Access Request
description: Handles GDPR Data Subject Access Requests (DSAR) end-to-end. When a DSAR is received, the playbook verifies the requestor's identity, searches all data systems for the subject's personal data, uses Riggs AI to compile and review the data package, obtains DPO approval, and delivers the response to the data subject. Tracks the 30-day regulatory deadline with an SLA timer.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Track DSAR request lifecycle and compliance deadline

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify DPO and compliance team of DSAR progress

config.description: Manually triggered when a Data Subject Access Request is received from an individual
Set 30-day SLA timer per GDPR Article 12(3) response deadline

data.label: Search All Data Systems for Subject

config.query: SELECT system_name, data_category, record_count, last_updated FROM data_inventory WHERE data_subject_email = '{{trigger_1.subject_email}}' OR data_subject_id = '{{trigger_1.subject_id}}' ORDER BY system_name
config.description: Query all data systems for personal data belonging to the data subject
Routes based on whether personal data was found for the data subject

config.additional_instructions: Compile a GDPR-compliant data subject access response. Include all personal data categories found, processing purposes, retention periods, third-party recipients, and data subject rights. Ensure the response meets Article 15 requirements.
config.description: AI-powered compilation of DSAR response package meeting GDPR Article 15 requirements
Data Protection Officer reviews and approves the DSAR response before delivery

notify.message:
Dear {{trigger_1.subject_name}},

In response to your Data Subject Access Request dated {{trigger_1.request_date}}, please find enclosed all personal data we hold about you.

{{analyze_1.summary}}

If you have any questions regarding this response, please contact our Data Protection Officer.

Regards,
Compliance Team

config.description: Deliver the approved DSAR response to the data subject

notify.message:
Dear {{trigger_1.subject_name}},

In response to your Data Subject Access Request dated {{trigger_1.request_date}}, we have conducted a thorough search of our systems and have found no personal data associated with your identity.

If you believe this is in error, please contact our Data Protection Officer.

Regards,
Compliance Team

config.description: Inform data subject that no personal data was found in our systems
Create a Jira ticket documenting the completed DSAR for audit trail
GDPR DSAR fulfillment complete -- response delivered and documented
